title: Add Tauri Android mobile support foundation

acceptance_criteria.text: Initialize first-class Tauri Android support without introducing a PWA or alternate architecture.
Add documented Android development and build commands that follow the Tauri mobile CLI path.
Verify the Android app launches on an emulator or physical device and renders the SkillForge Academy shell.
Verify bundled certification content and lesson assets load on Android for A+, Network+, and Security+ without network access, including JSON banks, SVG lesson assets, and PBQ data.
Verify learner state persistence on Android for progress, notes, bookmarks, settings, and active track selection.

Define and implement the Android small-screen information architecture and touch rules for core study flows: navigation, track switcher, dashboard, learning paths, practice, PBQ Lab, mock setup, flashcards, analytics, notes, preferences, dialogs, and review screens.

Define and validate Android file/storage behavior under sandbox rules, including local state location, encrypted backup export/import, file picker or share-sheet flow, permissions, and any required Tauri plugin; if blocked, record the exact mitigation.
Run the standard validation gates plus an Android build gate, documenting any host-machine dependency that prevents local execution.

source: User request: direct Tauri mobile support, Android first
